---
name: New test / scoring change
about: Propose a new test, a tier, or an adjustment to the scoring rubric.
title: "[test] "
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Type of change

- [ ] New test
- [ ] New tier
- [ ] Scoring rubric change
- [ ] Other (explain below)

## Proposal

Describe what the test should check. For scoring changes, describe the current and proposed point values and the rationale.

## Impact on existing scores

Any scoring change affects everyone's published scores. How big is the delta? Do any agents currently depend on the existing weights?

## Tier placement

Which tier should this live in, and why?

## Draft verification plan

Sketch the assertions your verify script would make.
